rich-markdown-diff.description: Professional visual Markdown diff with Math, Mermaid, and Git integration for better document reviews.
rich-markdown-diff.diffClipboard.title: Compare with Clipboard
rich-markdown-diff.nextChange.title: Next Change
rich-markdown-diff.prevChange.title: Previous Change
rich-markdown-diff.showGutterMarkers.des: Whether to show vertical diff markers in the gutter area.
rich-markdown-diff.showGitBlame.descript: Whether to load Git Blame metadata for the compared files.
rich-markdown-diff.lineHoverDelay.descri: The delay in milliseconds before showing Git Blame and Quick Edit indicators on hover.
